raw_consumer_statement: Purchase item on XX/XX/XXXX from XXXX they send me low quality product request a exchange they exchange the item but the one they send were also of low quality. I request to return but they wanted me to pay for shipping which was costly since it was furniture also in their return policy it said that if not happy which the item free return. Open an dispute with citi on XX/XX/XXXX they resolved it in favor of seller on XX/XX/XXXX. I try to reopen the case again but couldn't. Citi didn't even let me provide proof of my side when I open the dispute either.
